subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the rustling of the Most Exalted Pen; verily, it calleth thee unto God, the All-Powerful, the Almighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع صریر قلم الاعلی انه یدعوک الی الله المقتدر العزیز العلیم ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
